home.dynamic_empty: Fresh travel activity will appear here soon.
home.footer: Discover Egypt in a simple and elegant way

governorates.empty_attractions: Attractions from this governorate will appear here once Firestore has matching places.

weather.title: Weather
weather.error_message: Could not load weather right now. Please try again.

details.rating_error: Could not save rating. Please try again.
details.rating_lock_title: Sign in to rate this place

auth.onboarding_1_title: Explore Egypt with a guide that feels personal
auth.onboarding_1_subtitle: Move between governorates, landmarks, beaches, and museums with a polished experience built for discovery.
auth.onboarding_2_title: Save the places that make your trip yours
auth.onboarding_2_subtitle: Keep favorites close, return to them quickly, and shape a travel plan around what you actually love.
auth.onboarding_3_title: Plan smarter before you step outside
auth.onboarding_3_subtitle: Find highlights, ratings, details, maps, and audio guidance before your next stop.
auth.welcome_title: Save your journey and move through Egypt with a personal touch
auth.welcome_subtitle: Create an account to keep your favorite places, continue your trips across devices, and shape a more personal Nile Explorer experience.
auth.start_subtitle: Sign in, create an account, or keep browsing as a guest until you are ready.
auth.sign_in_subtitle: Enter your details to continue your curated Egypt journey.
auth.sign_in_visual_title: Your saved Egypt journey is waiting
auth.sign_in_visual_subtitle: Return to favorites, ratings, and destinations with a clean account experience.
auth.register_subtitle: Set up your traveler profile and keep every destination within reach.
auth.register_visual_title: Build a travel profile around what you love
auth.register_visual_subtitle: Create a calm home for your places, preferences, and future trips across Egypt.
auth.guest_subtitle: You can explore the app now and connect Firebase auth later without blocking the UI work.
auth.guest_mode: You are exploring as a guest
auth.guest_mode_subtitle: Guest mode keeps the experience light, but your account features stay limited until you sign in.
auth.personal_subtitle: Your account is ready for favorites, personalized journeys, and cross-device continuity.
auth.account_prompt: Make your account part of the trip
auth.account_prompt_subtitle: Sign in to unlock a fuller experience and prepare the app for Firebase integration.
auth.account_ready: Account connected to the app UI
auth.account_ready_subtitle: The UI flow is ready. You only need to replace the mock methods with your Firebase calls.
auth.invalid_password: Password must be at least 6 characters
auth.favorites_lock_title: Sign in to keep your favorites
auth.favorites_lock_subtitle: Favorites are connected to your account flow so your saved places can be ready for Firebase later.
